mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT j.JOB_ID AS jobId, c.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, j.TITLE AS title, j.FK_REGION_CODE AS location, j.SALARY AS salary, j.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, j.STATUS AS status, j.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, j.IS_HIDDEN AS isHidden, j.DEADLINE_AT AS deadlineAt, j.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, jc.CATEGORY_NAME AS jobCategory, (SELECT LISTAGG(s.SKILL_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY s.SKILL_ID) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING_SKILL jps JOIN TBL_SKILL s ON jps.FK_SKILL_ID = s.SKILL_ID WHERE jps.FK_JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID) AS skills, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION a WHERE a.FK_JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID) AS applicantCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY j.CREATED_AT DESC) AS rn FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING j JOIN TBL_MEMBER m ON j.FK_MEMBERID = m.MEMBERID JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON m.MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_CATEGORY jc ON j.FK_CATEGORY_ID = jc.CATEGORY_ID
AND j.STATUS NOT IN ('마감', '삭제됨')
AND ( c.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR j.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
AND j.STATUS = '마감'
AND j.STATUS = '게시중' AND j.IS_HIDDEN = 0
AND j.IS_HIDDEN = 1 AND j.STATUS != '마감' AND j.STATUS != '삭제됨' AND j.STATUS != '임시저장' AND j.STATUS != '대기'
AND j.STATUS = '대기'
AND j.STATUS = '삭제됨'
AND j.STATUS = '임시저장'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset}+1 AND #{offset}+#{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING j JOIN TBL_MEMBER m ON j.FK_MEMBERID = m.MEMBERID JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON m.MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID
AND ( c.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR j.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
AND j.STATUS = '게시중' AND j.IS_HIDDEN = 0
AND j.IS_HIDDEN = 1 AND j.STATUS != '마감' AND j.STATUS != '삭제됨' AND j.STATUS != '임시저장' AND j.STATUS != '대기'
AND j.STATUS = '대기'
AND j.STATUS = '마감'
AND j.STATUS = '삭제됨'
AND j.STATUS = '임시저장'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING
WHERE STATUS = '게시중' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
WHERE STATUS = '대기'
WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 1 AND STATUS != '마감' AND STATUS != '삭제됨' AND STATUS != '임시저장' AND STATUS != '대기'
WHERE STATUS = '마감'
WHERE STATUS = '삭제됨'
WHERE STATUS = '임시저장'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_JOB_POSTING SET IS_HIDDEN = #{isHidden}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE JOB_ID = #{jobId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING j JOIN TBL_MEMBER m ON j.FK_MEMBERID = m.MEMBERID JOIN TBL_COMPANY c ON m.MEMBERID = c.FK_MEMBERID WHERE j.STATUS NOT IN ('마감', '삭제됨')
AND ( c.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR j.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
